variants.name: 先锋 ¶
variants.ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你得知每个角色类型的一个角色，其中一个是与你邻座玩家的角色，其余角色不在场。
variants.firstNightReminder: Show the Pioneer 1 character of each type, 1 of which they neighbour & the rest are not in play.
variants.flavor: You can never cross the ocean unless you have the courage to lose sight of the shore.
